text:
philip      2006-11-01 21:07:58 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
    devel/lua50-gettext  Makefile 
  Removed files:
    devel/lua50-gettext  distinfo 
    devel/lua50-gettext/files Makefile 
  Log:
  Add devel/lua-gettext to work with Lua 5.0 and Lua 5.1 and turn
  devel/lua50-gettext into a slave port of it.
  
  PR:             ports/104988
  Submitted by:   Andrew Turner <andrew+ports@fubar.geek.nz> (maintainer)
  Repocopy by:    marcus
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
